steps.title: Read the model value
steps.content: The line of best fit gives the predicted number of visitors for a given temperature. At $32^\circ\text{C}$, the line is at about $480$ visitors.

steps.title: Check with two line points
steps.content: The displayed line is consistent with points near $(28, 240)$ and $(32, 480)$, so the prediction at $x=32$ is already on the line.

steps.title: Round to the requested place
steps.content: The prediction is already rounded to the nearest $10$. The answer is 480.
